title: Strict-system borrowed escape diagnostics for global/static/thread-local storage
feature: strict-system diagnostics for borrowed escape hazards

diagnostics.message: borrowed pointer escapes into global storage; copy to owned storage, extend owner lifetime, or mark explicitly unsafe
borrowed pointer escapes into static storage; copy to owned storage, extend owner lifetime, or mark explicitly unsafe
borrowed pointer escapes into thread-local storage; copy to owned storage, extend owner lifetime, or mark explicitly unsafe
